title: My Nephew Forged My POA, Stole $180K. So I Watched Him Lose Everything.
description: I spent $200,000 of my late husband's life insurance to put my orphaned nephew through law school and trusted him as my power of attorney. He repaid me by forging that POA, draining my $180K brokerage account, and buying a sports car. I studied probate litigation, proved the forgery, and won a $280K judgment that forced him to sell his practice, and now I own his old office condo while he works as a paralegal in the same building. #ElderFraud #FamilyBetrayal #LegalRevenge
thumb_text: HE STOLE MY $180K. NOW I OWN HIS OFFICE.
pinned_comment: If you spent $200,000 on a nephew who promised to care for you and he forged your POA to steal your retirement, would you have taken it to court like I did, or would you have walked away? Share your story below.

thumb_lines.text: I PAID FOR HIS LAW SCHOOL
I STUDIED PROBATE LAW AND SUED HIM FOR FRAUD
